title: Stainless Steel Saucepan Set – Non Stick Cooking Pots – Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Pot Suitable for All Hobs – 6pcs 16.7cm, 18.7cm & 20.9cm (3 Pots + 3 Lids) – by Nuovva
features: PREMIUM STAINLESS STEEL: Made with a durable 3-layer design (304 stainless steel + aluminium + 430 stainless steel) at 2.0mm thickness for excellent heat distribution and retention. Ensures fast, even cooking without uneven cold spots for desired results. The satin-polished interior and exterior offer a sleek, classic finish!

MUST-HAVE 6PC SET: Includes three saucepans (16cm – 1.3L, 18cm – 1.8L, 20cm – 2.7L) with glass lids featuring stainless steel knobs by Nuovva. Transparent lids let you monitor cooking without losing heat or moisture. Ideal for boiling, simmering, frying, and sautéing!

NATURALLY CHEMICAL-FREE: Our satin-polished interior presents a naturally non-stick surface without toxic coatings, choose the best for healthy cooking. Stainless steel resists rust, stains, and corrosion while preserving food flavours. Perfect for high-heat searing, frying, and slow cooking!

DURABLE RIVETED HANDLES: Featuring fully riveted stainless steel handles providing a secure, wobble-free grip that won’t loosen over time, The Nuovva stainless steel handles are ergonomically designed to stay cool on the stovetop for safe handling. Oven safe and built for a lifetime of durability, making it a reliable choice for any kitchen!

INDUCTION COMPATIBLE: Designed for all stovetops, including induction, gas, electric, and open flame, ensuring maximum versatility. The satin-polished finish resists stains and makes cleaning effortless. Dishwasher safe for hassle-free maintenance and long-lasting use!

Even heat distribution The precision-engineered tri-ply base eliminates hot spots, ensuring perfectly balanced heat for accurate, reliable cooking. Naturally Non-Stick Surface The satin-polished stainless steel interior offers excellent food release and effortless cleanup—no coating required. Oven-Ready Performance Move seamlessly from hob to oven with confidence—built to handle high temperatures for all-in-one cooking convenience.
